title: ALP Emit Registry v1
description: Validates metadata/emit-registry-v1.json -- the single source of truth for every `--emit` mode the SDK exposes across scripts/alp_project.py and scripts/alp_orchestrate/ (and re-exposed by scripts/alp_cli/emit.py / `west alp-emit`). scripts/check_emit_registry.py validates the registry against this schema AND asserts the registry's mode set exactly equals the real `--emit` choices parsed out of the two CLIs, so a mode can never drift between the code and this contract. Stability: schemaVersion 1 is additive-only (new optional per-mode fields only); a breaking change ships as schemaVersion 2.

modes.description: One entry per `--emit` mode, sorted for readability (not machine-enforced).

cli.description: Which CLI's argparse `--emit choices=[...]` this mode is a member of (the front door / drift-gate anchor). scripts/alp_project.py routes some of its choices through scripts/alp_orchestrate/ internally; `cli` names the front door, not necessarily the renderer's home module.

module.description: Repo-relative path to the module that actually renders this mode's output.

scope.description: core: one artefact per per-core slice (zephyr-conf/yocto-conf/cmake-args/zephyr-board). project: one artefact for the whole SoM+board project, optionally scoped by --core. system: a v2 whole-system (multi-slice) orchestrator artefact (carve-outs, IPC, boot order, build plan).

input.description: --input board.yaml path; always accepted, defaults to ./board.yaml.

output.description: optional: --output <path> accepted, defaults to stdout. required: the mode refuses to run without --output (zephyr-board writes a directory, not a stream). stdout-only: the owning CLI (alp_orchestrate) has no --output flag at all for --emit; it always writes stdout.

core.description: required: --core <id> must be supplied. optional: --core scopes/selects a slice; omitted means sum/union across cores. ignored: --core is accepted by the parser but not consumed by this mode (project-wide/system-wide emit).

build_root.description: Whether --build-root affects this mode's output (true only for build-plan).

template.description: --template <id> (metadata/templates/catalog-v1.json). Optional key, present only on modes that consume it (scaffold): required means the mode refuses to run without it.

sku.description: --sku <SKU>. Optional key, present only on modes that consume it (scaffold): required means the mode refuses to run without it.

os.description: Runtime(s) this mode is valid for. ["any"] means no os restriction; a core naming an incompatible os is a hard error (see #605).

schema_id.description: metadata/schemas/<schema_id>.schema.json when this mode's output is governed by a JSON Schema contract; null otherwise.

path.description: Deterministic default output path (relative to a project's build root) when one exists in the real build/materialise flow; null when the mode has no fixed default location (pure stdout / caller-chosen --output).

consumer_hint.description: Who consumes this artefact (build system / IDE / Studio / tool).
